name: @campshell/apify-meta
description: Apify-backed Facebook/Meta analytics service template for Campshell

scripts.build-bundle: node -e "import('@campshell/core').then(m => m.buildBundle({ templateDir: process.cwd() })).then(r => { console.log('Bundle:', r.bundlePath); r.warnings.forEach(w => console.warn('Warning:', w)); })"
